hero.label: Our Story
hero.headline: BUILT ON CHEMISTRY. DRIVEN BY PERFORMANCE.
hero.subheadline: JRP Lubricants is the flagship brand of Jay Trading Company — established in 2018 in Gujarat with a mission to manufacture world-class lubricants for domestic and international markets.

story.headline: A BRAND WITH GLOBAL AMBITIONS
story.body1: Jay Trading Company (JTC) was founded in 2018 in Gujarat with a clear vision: to build a lubricant brand that competes on quality, not just price. JRP Lubricants is that brand — our flagship range of industrial oils, automotive lubricants, specialty greases, and marine products, all manufactured in-house.
story.body2: From our manufacturing facility in Gujarat, we produce 500+ formulations built to international standards. We are fully export-ready — with compliance documentation, flexible packaging, and the product range to serve distributors, OEMs, and industrial buyers across global markets. We're actively seeking our first international distribution partnerships.

milestones.title: JTC Founded
milestones.description: Jay Trading Company established in Gujarat — the parent company behind the JRP Lubricants brand.

milestones.title: JRP Brand Launch
milestones.description: JRP Lubricants launched as our flagship product brand, covering industrial, automotive, and specialty categories.

milestones.title: ISO Certification
milestones.description: Achieved ISO 9001:2015 certification — formalising our commitment to consistent, internationally recognised quality.

milestones.title: 500+ Formulations
milestones.description: Product portfolio expanded to 500+ SKUs across industrial, automotive, grease, and marine categories.

milestones.title: Export Readiness
milestones.description: Completed full export compliance setup — documentation, packaging, and certifications ready for international markets.

milestones.title: Seeking Global Partners
milestones.description: Actively pursuing distribution partnerships across the Middle East, Africa, Southeast Asia, and Europe.

items.title: Uncompromising Quality
items.description: Every batch is tested against international standards before dispatch. No exceptions, no shortcuts.

items.title: Innovation in Formulation
items.description: Our in-house R&D team continuously develops new formulations to meet evolving equipment and environmental standards.

items.title: Customer Partnership
items.description: We don't just sell lubricants — we work alongside our customers to solve lubrication challenges and reduce downtime.

items.title: Sustainable Manufacturing
items.description: ISO 14001:2015 certified. We operate with environmental responsibility at every stage of production.

facility.headline: WORLD-CLASS FACILITY IN GUJARAT
facility.subheadline: Our Gujarat plant combines modern blending technology with rigorous quality control — capable of producing everything from small specialty batches to large-volume industrial orders.

team.headline: THE PEOPLE BEHIND JRP
team.subheadline: Our leadership team brings together expertise in lubricant chemistry, manufacturing operations, and business development.

members.name: Jay Trading Company
members.title: Parent Company
members.bio: JTC was founded in 2018 in Gujarat as the parent company behind the JRP Lubricants brand. Our mission from day one: manufacture world-class lubricants and build a brand ready for global markets.

members.name: JRP Lubricants
members.title: Flagship Brand
members.bio: JRP is our flagship lubricant brand — covering industrial oils, automotive lubricants, specialty greases, and marine products. Every formulation is developed and manufactured in-house in Gujarat.

members.name: Export Division
members.title: Global Outreach
members.bio: Our export team is fully set up with compliance documentation, international packaging, and market-ready formulations. We're actively seeking our first international distribution partnerships.

cta.headline: PARTNER WITH JRP LUBRICANTS
cta.subheadline: Whether you need a reliable lubricant supplier, a private-label partner, or a technical consultation — we're ready to work with you.
